comments.author: phase-4-coordinator
comments.content: Audited: most unwrap/expect calls are in #[cfg(test)] blocks which is acceptable. The non-test ones (buffer.rs:123, creation/mod.rs:219, arc.rs, display.rs, manipulation) need individual review — each has a local invariant that makes the unwrap unreachable. Deferring to a dedicated refactor pass.
